metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: This course develops students' understanding of business fundamentals, entrepreneurial thinking, and marketing strategies. Students learn to identify opportunities, create business plans, develop marketing campaigns, and understand the principles of value creation. Through practical projects, students explore how successful entrepreneurs think and operate in various industries.
metadata.general_description: Elective course focused on entrepreneurship, business planning, and marketing principles.

big_ideas.statement: Entrepreneurs identify opportunities and create value by understanding market needs and solving problems.
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful businesses begin with insight into what people need or want, followed by thoughtful design and delivery of solutions that create value. Students learn to observe, question, and identify gaps in the market.

big_ideas.statement: Effective marketing connects the value of a product or service with its intended audience.
big_ideas.elaboration: Marketing involves understanding target customers, communicating benefits clearly, and building relationships. Students explore how different businesses reach and engage their audiences through various channels and strategies.

big_ideas.statement: Business success requires planning, financial understanding, and risk management.
big_ideas.elaboration: Entrepreneurs must create business plans, manage resources wisely, understand costs and revenue, and navigate uncertainty. Students develop foundational financial literacy and strategic thinking skills.

big_ideas.statement: Entrepreneurship reflects cultural values and creates social and economic impact.
big_ideas.elaboration: Students explore how Indigenous and diverse business models contribute to communities, and how ethical practices and social responsibility influence long-term success.

i_can_statements: I can conduct market research to identify customer needs and market gaps
I can evaluate the feasibility of a business idea
I can analyze competitors and their positioning
I can identify barriers to entry and potential risks

competencies.raw: Design products and services that meet customer needs
i_can_statements: I can use customer feedback to refine a product or service concept
I can develop unique value propositions
I can consider customer experience in design decisions
I can prototype and test offerings before launch
I can develop marketing strategies targeted to specific audiences
I can create compelling messages and brand positioning
I can design marketing materials (visuals, copy, advertisements)
I can plan multi-channel marketing approaches
I can write business plans that include goals, strategies, and timelines
I can set measurable objectives for marketing and sales
I can create action plans for launching products or services
I can adapt strategies based on market feedback and results
I can pitch ideas persuasively to potential investors or customers
I can write clear, professional business communications
I can negotiate and build relationships with partners
I can present findings and recommendations confidently
I can create budgets and forecast revenue
I can understand profit, loss, and break-even analysis
I can track expenses and manage cash flow
I can calculate pricing strategies
I can identify roles and responsibilities needed for a business
I can delegate tasks effectively
I can motivate and support team members
I can resolve conflicts and make collaborative decisions
I can plan and execute business projects
I can use project management tools and techniques
I can identify and solve operational problems
I can measure performance against goals
I can use software and apps for business management
I can leverage social media and digital marketing tools
I can create digital content and online presence
I can analyze data and use it for business decisions

competencies.raw: Build e-commerce and online business models
i_can_statements: I can understand online sales platforms and logistics
I can design online customer experiences
I can optimize for search and online visibility
I can understand digital payment systems and security

competencies.raw: Use technology for marketing and customer engagement
i_can_statements: I can create digital marketing campaigns
I can use analytics to track marketing performance
I can leverage automation and tools for customer engagement
I can understand customer relationship management (CRM) systems
I can identify emerging technologies relevant to business
I can evaluate how technology disrupts industries
I can consider cybersecurity and data privacy
I can explore startup culture and innovation models

areas.name: Entrepreneurial Thinking and Opportunity Recognition
topics: Market research and customer needs analysis

areas.name: Marketing and Customer Engagement
topics: Marketing strategy and mix (product, price, place, promotion)
Digital marketing and social media strategy

areas.name: Operations and Growth
topics: Business operations and supply chain basics
Sustainability and social responsibility in business
